requirements_addressed: AC-001: create_orchestrator exported with correct signature
AC-002: create_orchestrator uses create_deep_agent with all required kwargs
AC-003: implementer_subagent function accepts model param
AC-004: Implementer SubAgent has all required fields including 4 tools
AC-005: evaluator_subagent function accepts model param
AC-006: Evaluator SubAgent has tools=[] explicit empty list
AC-007: builder_async_subagent as AsyncSubAgent with configurable url
AC-009: All files pass lint/format checks

completion_promises.criterion_text: agents/orchestrator.py exports create_orchestrator(reasoning_model: str, implementation_model: str, domain_prompt: str) -> CompiledStateGraph
completion_promises.evidence: create_orchestrator function is defined in agents/agents.py with exact signature (reasoning_model: str, implementation_model: str, domain_prompt: str) -> CompiledStateGraph and re-exported from agents/__init__.py. Tests TestCreateOrchestratorExport verify importability, parameter names, and type annotations.

completion_promises.criterion_text: create_orchestrator uses create_deep_agent() with: model, tools, system_prompt, subagents (list of 3), memory, skills, context_schema
completion_promises.evidence: create_orchestrator calls create_deep_agent() with model=reasoning_model, tools=4 orchestrator tools, system_prompt with domain_prompt injected, subagents=[implementer, evaluator, builder], memory=None, skills=None, context_schema=None. Tests TestCreateOrchestratorCallsDeepAgent verify all kwargs via mock patching (6 tests).

completion_promises.criterion_text: agents/implementer.py exports implementer_subagent as a function that accepts model: str and returns SubAgent TypedDict
completion_promises.evidence: implementer_subagent(model: str) -> SubAgent is defined in agents/agents.py and re-exported from agents/__init__.py. TestImplementerSubagent.test_accepts_model_param and test_returns_dict verify the signature and return type.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Implementer SubAgent includes: name, description, system_prompt, model (required), tools (the 4 tools from TASK-OEX-002)
completion_promises.evidence: implementer_subagent returns a SubAgent dict with name='implementer', description (>10 chars), system_prompt (formatted IMPLEMENTER_SYSTEM_PROMPT), model matching the input param, and tools=[analyse_context, plan_pipeline, execute_command, verify_output]. Tests verify all 5 fields and that tools are the correct 4 BaseTool instances by name.

completion_promises.criterion_text: agents/evaluator.py exports evaluator_subagent as a function that accepts model: str and returns SubAgent TypedDict
completion_promises.evidence: evaluator_subagent(model: str) -> SubAgent is defined in agents/agents.py and re-exported from agents/__init__.py. TestEvaluatorSubagent.test_accepts_model_param and test_returns_dict verify the signature and return type.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Evaluator SubAgent includes: name, description, system_prompt, model (required), tools=[] (explicit empty list — NO tools)
completion_promises.evidence: evaluator_subagent returns a SubAgent dict with name='evaluator', description, system_prompt (formatted EVALUATOR_SYSTEM_PROMPT), model matching input, and tools=[] (explicit empty list). TestEvaluatorSubagent.test_has_tools_explicit_empty_list asserts tools==[] and isinstance(tools, list).

completion_promises.criterion_text: agents/builder.py exports builder_async_subagent as AsyncSubAgent TypedDict with: name, description, graph_id, url (configurable)
completion_promises.evidence: builder_async_subagent(url=None, graph_id='builder') -> AsyncSubAgent is defined in agents/agents.py and re-exported. Returns dict with name='builder', description, graph_id='builder'. URL is configurable via parameter (omitted by default for ASGI transport). TestBuilderAsyncSubagent verifies all fields and url configurability.

agents/__init__.py imports and re-exports create_orchestrator, implementer_subagent, evaluator_subagent, builder_async_subagent in __all__. TestAgentsPackageExports verifies all 4 exports are importable and present in __all__.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors
completion_promises.evidence: All files pass 'ruff check' and 'ruff format --check' with zero errors. TestCodeQuality verifies docstrings exist on all functions and the module.
